channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Indiana primaries show the political cost of crossing Trump: ANALYSIS
item.description: The message from Indiana’s Republican primaries was hard to miss: if you cross Trump -- even in a state legislative race -- he’s willing to come after...

item.title: Tech is betting on a former executive in the race for California governor
item.description: Tech leaders are betting on a former executive to take the lead in the California governor's race

item.title: Agents can kill bears from the air to protect Alaska caribou, judge says
item.description: The Mulchatna caribou herd is expected to begin calving soon, and the babies are particularly susceptible to being eaten by bears or wolves.

item.title: Trump promised cheaper drugs. Some prices dropped. Many others shot up.
item.description: Since his second term started, President Trump has introduced a flurry of initiatives aimed at taming the excesses of the pharmaceutical industry.
